tenant_description: Manage your site configuration and integrations
site_description_placeholder: A short description of your site
site_name_help: The name of your platform displayed across the application
support_email_help: Email address for customer support inquiries
platform_active_help: Enable or disable the entire platform. When disabled, only admins can access the system.
max_tenants_per_user_help: Maximum number of tenants a single user can create (1-100)
site_status_description: Control public access to your site
maintenance_mode_help: When enabled, your public site displays a maintenance notice to visitors.
analytics_integrations_description: Third-party analytics scripts injected into the public storefront. Leave blank to disable a provider.
ga4_help: Found in GA4 > Admin > Data Streams > your stream
gtm_help: Found in GTM > your workspace (top of page)
plausible_help: The domain you registered in Plausible (without https://)
meta_pixel_help: Found in Meta Events Manager > your pixel
cookie_consent_description: Control legal policy links and which providers can run after user consent.
privacy_policy_url_help: Public URL to your privacy policy page.
cookie_policy_url_help: Public URL to your cookie policy page. Required when optional providers are enabled.
updated_description_central: General platform settings have been saved successfully.
updated_description_tenant: Your site settings have been saved successfully.
